Metadata.title: Coin Global Guatemala | Global Fiduciary and Financial Structuring
Metadata.description: We design secure and compliant fiduciary, corporate, and digital asset structures to connect global capital with international opportunities. Headquartered in Guatemala City.
Metadata.keywords: fiduciary Guatemala, financial structuring, digital assets, crypto governance, investment Guatemala, SPV Guatemala, Coin Global

Hero.subtitle: We design secure and compliant fiduciary, corporate, and digital asset structures to connect global capital with international opportunities.

Services.title: Fiduciary and Financial Services
Services.description: We design secure and compliant fiduciary, corporate, and digital asset structures to connect global capital with international opportunities.

items.title: Private and Family Trusts
items.description: Asset protection, succession planning and family office structuring with international reach.

items.title: Corporate Structuring and Investment
items.description: Creation of sophisticated legal vehicles and administration of structures for cross-border operations.

items.title: Digital Asset and Crypto Governance
items.description: Secure legal and regulatory frameworks for Bitcoin, stablecoins and tokenized instruments under institutional standards.

items.title: Investment Fund Administration
items.description: Administrative management of private funds with transparent reporting and comprehensive regulatory oversight.

items.title: Cross-border Contracts and Governance
items.description: Legal formation of multi-jurisdictional entities, governance vehicles and international corporate agreements.

items.title: Financial Operations Center
items.description: Expert management for multi-currency operations and high-value transactions under regulatory rigor.

About.p1: We design and manage international fiduciary, legal and financial solutions. We act as the secure bridge between our clients' capital and opportunities in the world's most solid jurisdictions.
About.p2: Our approach combines sophisticated legal architecture and rigorous regulatory compliance for private clients, corporations and exclusive investment funds.

capabilities_items.title: Private and Family Trusts
capabilities_items.desc: Tailored fiduciary structures for asset protection, succession and governance in multiple jurisdictions.

capabilities_items.title: Investment Fund Administration
capabilities_items.desc: Third-party fund management with transparent reporting and regulatory oversight.

capabilities_items.title: Corporate Structures and Holdings
capabilities_items.desc: Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) and holding entities for investment and international expansion.

capabilities_items.title: Digital Asset and Crypto Structuring
capabilities_items.desc: Legal frameworks for Bitcoin, stablecoins and tokenized instruments under AML/CFT and FATCA standards.

capabilities_items.title: Cross-border Contracts and Governance
capabilities_items.desc: Formation and management of multi-jurisdictional entities, governance vehicles and arbitration clauses.

capabilities_items.title: Global Financial Operations Center
capabilities_items.desc: Multi-currency exchange, digital custody and complex international transfers under regulatory compliance.

About.footer_desc: Regional center for structuring in Central America
